2606.14418.title: Causal Object-Centric Models for Planning with Monte Carlo Tree Search
2606.14418.paper_summary: We introduce COMET (Causal Object-centric Model for Efficient Tree search), a model-based reinforcement learning algorithm that performs Monte Carlo Tree Search in a slot-structured latent space. COMET pairs a frozen unsupervised object-centric encoder with a transformer-based world model, in which actions are bound to objects through a novel action-slot fusion mechanism that is used in slot transition prediction. Policy and value heads use object-causal attention, modulating token interactions by learned per-slot relevance scores so that decision-making concentrates on task-relevant entities. COMET adds an explicit object-level inductive bias to MuZero-style latent planning. Across eight visually and dynamically diverse tasks from the Object-Centric Visual RL benchmark, ManiSkill, Robosuite, and VizDoom, COMET achieves a higher mean normalized score during the early stages of training compared to object-centric and monolithic baselines.
2606.14418.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了 COMET（因果物件中心模型以進行高效樹搜尋），這是一種基於模型的強化學習算法，能在槽結構的潛在空間中執行蒙地卡羅樹搜尋。COMET 將一個凍結的無監督物件中心編碼器與基於Transformer的世界模型配對，在這個模型中，通過一種新穎的動作槽融合機制將動作綁定到物件上，該機制用於槽過渡預測。政策和價值頭使用物件因果注意力，通過學習的每槽相關性分數調節標記互動，使決策集中在與任務相關的實體上。COMET 為 MuZero 風格的潛在規劃增加了一個明確的物件級歸納偏見。在來自物件中心視覺強化學習基準的八個視覺和動態多樣化任務中，ManiSkill、Robosuite 和 VizDoom，COMET 在訓練的早期階段達到了比物件中心和單體基準更高的平均標準化分數。
2606.14418.author: Rodion Vakhitov et.al.
2606.14418.authors: Rodion Vakhitov, Leonid Ugadiarov, Alexey Skrynnik, Aleksandr Panov
